parameters.query:
SELECT 
  revenue_line,
  currency,
  account_type,
  minimum_fee_mean,
  minimum_fee_median,
  maximum_fee_mean,
  maximum_fee_median,
  percentage_fee_mean,
  percentage_fee_median,
  flat_fee_mean,
  flat_fee_median,
  competitors_count,
  last_updated
FROM pricing_analysis 
WHERE active = true
ORDER BY revenue_line, currency

-- NOTE: This queries your TRANSACTION database (not Neon)
-- Configure the second database credential for this node
SELECT 
  transaction_id,
  revenue_line,
  currency,
  COALESCE(account_type, 'N/A') as account_type,
  transaction_amount,
  applied_fee,
  fee_type,
  transaction_timestamp,
  customer_id,
  channel
FROM transactions 
WHERE 
  processed_for_revenue_assurance = false 
  AND transaction_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
ORDER BY transaction_timestamp DESC
LIMIT 1000

nodes.name: Get Unprocessed Transactions
nodes.notes: Configure your transaction database credentials here

parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO revenue_discrepancies (
  transaction_id,
  revenue_line,
  currency,
  expected_fee,
  actual_fee,
  variance,
  variance_percentage,
  discrepancy_type,
  severity,
  description,
  revenue_impact,
  status,
  created_at
) VALUES
{{ $json.sql_values }}
ON CONFLICT (transaction_id) DO UPDATE SET
  severity = EXCLUDED.severity,
  revenue_impact = EXCLUDED.revenue_impact,
  variance = EXCLUDED.variance,
  variance_percentage = EXCLUDED.variance_percentage,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING id, transaction_id, severity;

=UPDATE transactions 
SET 
  processed_for_revenue_assurance = true,
  revenue_assurance_processed_at = NOW(),
  revenue_assurance_status = CASE 
    WHEN transaction_id IN ({{ $json.discrepancy_transaction_ids }}) 
    THEN 'DISCREPANCY_FOUND' 
    ELSE 'VALIDATED' 
  END
WHERE transaction_id IN ({{ $json.all_transaction_ids }});

nodes.name: Slack Alert - High Severity
nodes.notes: Update with your Slack webhook URL
